claims.quote:
Visiting medical student clerkships
Elective clinical rotations for visiting medical students
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic College of Medicine & Science offers visiting medical student clerkships described as elective clinical rotations for visiting medical students.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Page enumerates 'Visiting medical student clerkships - Elective clinical rotations for visiting medical students' which is a Tier 1 USCE-relevant signal, though this is a system-wide overview page.
claims.limitations: System-level/college-wide overview page; does not specify campus or eligibility for IMGs.
claims.visibilityRationale: USCE keyword detected on JSON_LD; not the expected page family — needs review

claims.quote:
Health sciences education
140+ programs, internships, and rotations in 50 health sciences fields
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic College of Medicine & Science enumerates 140+ health sciences programs, internships, and rotations across 50 health sciences fields.
claims.limitations: System/college-wide; not narrowed to medical student visiting electives or campus.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Health-sciences internships/rotations belong to pre-residency tier although not narrowly medical-student-visiting.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 focused on the visiting medical student bullet and did not separately emit the adjacent Health sciences education programs/internships/rotations enumeration.
claims.visibilityRationale: USCE keyword detected on JSON_LD; not the expected page family — needs review

claims.quote:
Biomedical research training
Ph.D. and master's degrees in biomedical sciences
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic College of Medicine & Science offers Ph.D. and master's degrees in biomedical sciences as biomedical research training.
claims.limitations: Degree programs, not short research electives.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Research/graduate degree training is pre-residency tier for the biomedical pipeline.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured visiting clerkships and GME but did not enumerate the biomedical research degree pathway.
claims.visibilityRationale: USCE keyword detected on JSON_LD; not the expected page family — needs review

claims.quote: Carleigh Eagle's path to Mayo Clinic began not in an engineering lab or medical school classroom, but as an intern in the Clinical Research Internship Study Program (CRISP).
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic operates the Clinical Research Internship Study Program (CRISP), a named research internship.
claims.limitations: Mentioned in a news story; eligibility, application, fee not stated.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Named research internship is a Tier 1 pre-residency opportunity signal.
claims.whyA1Missed: Buried in a news-feed story rather than the main program enumeration; A1 stayed on the navigation section.
claims.visibilityRationale: USCE keyword detected on JSON_LD; not the expected page family — needs review

claims.quote:
Non-clinical education programs
Internships, experiences, and opportunities for learners
claims.claimText: Mayo Clinic College of Medicine & Science offers non-clinical education programs comprising internships, experiences, and opportunities for learners.
claims.limitations: Non-clinical scope; not USCE-eligible for IMG clinical experience.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Pre-residency learner internships; explicitly non-clinical so cannot count as USCE but worth capturing.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 skipped this entry because it is labeled non-clinical and not a visiting student clerkship.
claims.visibilityRationale: USCE keyword detected on JSON_LD; not the expected page family — needs review
